goal: Add Full Access Execution Policy governance without changing product acceptance truth.
reason: Remove routine confirmation pauses while retaining checkpoint, rollback, bounded recovery, platform controls, and hard human-interrupt conditions.

pre_action_checkpoint.reason: The action adds project-local governance documents and tests; it does not delete files, mutate external state, install a system dependency, or change a release target.

rollback_plan: Remove the three Full Access policy documents and their dedicated test.
Remove the test registration from the validation manifest and governance required-file list.
remaining_gap: Backend remediation, complete document-to-knowledge E2E, progress events, full UI workflow, and EXE packaging remain active.
next_required_e2e_step: Resume MinerU real smoke, then remediate and smoke OpenDataLoader and Marker before connecting document understanding to knowledge base and package build.
